name: Steamed Persimmon Halva
recipeInstructions:
Vegetable oil can be substituted for the clarified butter.
In a large bowl, mix together 1 cup flour and 1 teaspoon baking soda.
Add 1/2 cup clarified butter. Mix in 2 teaspoons ground cardamom,
1 cup brown sugar, 2 cups persimmon pulp, 1 teaspoon lemon juice,
1/2 cup raisins, and 1/2 cup chopped walnuts. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
Pour the mixture into a six-cup container coated with ghee or oil.
Cover with foil and steam in a pressure cooker without the valve for about 1 hour.
Allow to cool before cutting into small pieces for serving.
A pressure cooker with a six-cup size container is ideal. One large persimmon yields approximately 1 cup of pulp.
